entry.title: Vlog #634 - Laurence Anyways (mon film préféré ?)

entry.title: International Youth Day 2020: Why is it celebrated, What is its relevance Oneindia News

link.title: International Youth Day 2020: Why is it celebrated, What is its relevance Oneindia News

entry.content:
International Youth Day is celebrated on 12th August. This year’s theme is Youth Engagement for Global Action. It seeks to highlight the ways in which the engagement of young people at the local, national and global levels is enriching national and multilateral institutions and processes as well as draw lessons on how their representation and engagement in formal institutional politics can be significantly enhanced.
Designated by the United Nations as an awareness day, International Youth Day holds the purpose to draw attention to a given set of cultural and legal issues surrounding youth. The first IYD was observed on August 12, 2000.
entry.summary: International Youth Day is celebrated on 12th August. This year’s theme is Youth Engagement for Global Action. It seeks to highlight the ways in which the engagement of young people at the local, national and global levels is enriching national and multilateral institutions and processes as well as draw lessons on how their representation and engagement in formal institutional politics can be significantly enhanced. Designated by the United Nations as an awareness day, International Youth Day holds the purpose to draw attention to a given set of cultural and legal issues surrounding youth. The first IYD was observed on August 12, 2000.

entry.title: A Platito Shares The Benefits Of Indoor Water Plants

link.title: A Platito Shares The Benefits Of Indoor Water Plants

entry.content:
Looking for an easy way to exercise your green thumb? Menard AV Reyes shares his simple tips on how to grow and propagate water-based plants indoors.
* * *
Know more about indoor gardening with these articles!
How To Successfully Maintain An Indoor Herb Garden -
Pink Plants You Can Buy Online for Your Indoor Garden -
* * *
Do have any home DIY projects you’re proud of? Share them with us and you might just get featured on Real Living? Send high resolution photos to reallivingonline@gmail.com, and tell us a little bit about your project. We can’t wait to hear from you!
entry.summary: Looking for an easy way to exercise your green thumb? Menard AV Reyes shares his simple tips on how to grow and propagate water-based plants indoors. * * * Know more about indoor gardening with these articles! How To Successfully Maintain An Indoor Herb Garden - Pink Plants You Can Buy Online for Your Indoor Garden - * * * Do have any home DIY projects you’re proud of? Share them with us and you might just get featured on Real Living? Send high resolution photos to reallivingonline@gmail.com, and tell us a little bit about your project. We can’t wait to hear from you!

entry.title: International Cat Day: The art of photographing Larry, the beloved Downing Street cat

link.title: International Cat Day: The art of photographing Larry, the beloved Downing Street cat

entry.content: Photographer Justin Ng explains his obsession with Larry, the beloved Downing Street cat. Justin, an Australian native, is popular on social media for sharing his pictures of the 13-year-old brown and white tabby, that has been a permanent fixture of the British Prime Minister’s residence since 2011.
entry.summary: Photographer Justin Ng explains his obsession with Larry, the beloved Downing Street cat. Justin, an Australian native, is popular on social media for sharing his pictures of the 13-year-old brown and white tabby, that has been a permanent fixture of the British Prime Minister’s residence since 2011.

entry.title: Root Of The Recipe: How Cooking Made Me Rediscover My Italian Heritage

link.title: Root Of The Recipe: How Cooking Made Me Rediscover My Italian Heritage

entry.content: In episode one of Root Of The Recipe, we meet Paola Maggiulli – the office worker turned Italian food expert who left behind her well-paid 9-5 office job to pursue a more fulfilling career in the world of cookery – and to reconnect with her heritage.
entry.summary: In episode one of Root Of The Recipe, we meet Paola Maggiulli – the office worker turned Italian food expert who left behind her well-paid 9-5 office job to pursue a more fulfilling career in the world of cookery – and to reconnect with her heritage.

entry.title: Putin Says Russia Has COVID-19 Vaccine While Scientists Say Crucial Phase 3 Trials Were Skipped

link.title: Putin Says Russia Has COVID-19 Vaccine While Scientists Say Crucial Phase 3 Trials Were Skipped

entry.content: Vladimir Putin announced that Russia has a coronavirus vaccine, but several scientists point to a lack of data for their skepticism. Veuer’s Justin Kircher has the story.
entry.summary: Vladimir Putin announced that Russia has a coronavirus vaccine, but several scientists point to a lack of data for their skepticism. Veuer’s Justin Kircher has the story.

entry.title: Karen Mack, LA Commons: How Arts and Activism Can Make Social Change SPARK S2 Ep1

link.title: Karen Mack, LA Commons: How Arts and Activism Can Make Social Change SPARK S2 Ep1

entry.content:
Karen Mack, the Founder and Director of LA Commons, joins Joanne on an episode of SPARK to talk about how her organization uses the power of arts and culture to build and engage diverse communities across Los Angeles.
Listen to the full SPARK podcast on Spotify, the Podcast App, and Buzzsprout!
Follow Joanne on Twitter
Follow Joanne on Facebook
Follow Joanne on Instagram
Follow Joanne on Linkedin
About Joanne:
Joanne is a grandma of all trades. On any day, she is as much a corporate leader, as she is a motorcyclist, avid fly fisher, and wine connoisseur. On SPARK, she is her authentic self, as she dives head-first into meaningful and intentional conversations with her guests; and she promises to never stop exploring.
About SPARK:
This isn’t your Grandma’s podcast…and Joanne isn’t any ordinary Grandma. She’s curious, spirited, playful, and a hyper trendsetter. SPARK pulls people in to talk about what inspires them and motivates them to create change.
#SPARKtheFuture
entry.summary: Karen Mack, the Founder and Director of LA Commons, joins Joanne on an episode of SPARK to talk about how her organization uses the power of arts and culture to build and engage diverse communities across Los Angeles. Listen to the full SPARK podcast on Spotify, the Podcast App, and Buzzsprout! Follow Joanne on Twitter Follow Joanne on Facebook Follow Joanne on Instagram Follow Joanne on Linkedin About Joanne: Joanne is a grandma of all trades. On any day, she is as much a corporate leader, as she is a motorcyclist, avid fly fisher, and wine connoisseur. On SPARK, she is her authentic self, as she dives head-first into meaningful and intentional conversations with her guests; and she promises to never stop exploring. About SPARK: This isn’t your Grandma’s podcast…and Joanne isn’t any ordinary Grandma. She’s curious, spirited, playful, and a hyper trendsetter. SPARK pulls people in to talk about what inspires them and motivates them to create change. #SPARKtheFuture

entry.title: Le ZappFoot du mardi 11 août 2020

link.title: Le ZappFoot du mardi 11 août 2020

entry.content: Au sommaire de notre Zappfoot du mardi 11 aout 2020, la pression monte en France la veille du 1/4 de finale de Ligue des Champions entre le PSG et l’Atalanta, Quique Setien aurait un plan anti-Bayern, Bruno Fernandes l’homme providentiel de Manchester United. C’est le tour d’horizon des gros titres de la presse écrite en Europe ! Décryptage des différentes Unes et grosses infos du jour !
entry.summary: Au sommaire de notre Zappfoot du mardi 11 aout 2020, la pression monte en France la veille du 1/4 de finale de Ligue des Champions entre le PSG et l’Atalanta, Quique Setien aurait un plan anti-Bayern, Bruno Fernandes l’homme providentiel de Manchester United. C’est le tour d’horizon des gros titres de la presse écrite en Europe ! Décryptage des différentes Unes et grosses infos du jour !

entry.title: How Crucial is Mahinda Rajapaksa’s Return as PM for India-Lanka Ties?

link.title: How Crucial is Mahinda Rajapaksa’s Return as PM for India-Lanka Ties?

entry.content: Mahinda Rajapaksa returns as Sri Lanka’s Prime Minister for the fourth time. Amid a standoff with China, maintaining ties with Sri Lanka is a big challenge for India. PM Modi’s call to Rajapaksa, even before the official results were out, was a first move towards better relations with the island nation.
entry.summary: Mahinda Rajapaksa returns as Sri Lanka’s Prime Minister for the fourth time. Amid a standoff with China, maintaining ties with Sri Lanka is a big challenge for India. PM Modi’s call to Rajapaksa, even before the official results were out, was a first move towards better relations with the island nation.

This is the kind of candy shop you should go to occasionally… 2-10-1 Sakuragikita, Wakaba-ku, Chiba City, Chiba Prefecture
DJ Monster…the showdown of yokai theme songs vs.
Games (GB Edition)… July 1992

entry.title: Découvrez la bande-annonce de ‘Ratched’, la nouvelle série horrifique de Netflix inspirée de ‘Vol au-dessus d’un nid de coucou’

link.title: Découvrez la bande-annonce de ‘Ratched’, la nouvelle série horrifique de Netflix inspirée de ‘Vol au-dessus d’un nid de coucou’

entry.content: Ce mardi 4 août, Netflix a dévoilé la bande-annonce de sa nouvelle série horrifique, produite et réalisée par Ryan Murphy ("American Horror Story", "Hollywood", "The Politician") et Evan Romansky. Son nom? "Ratched".
entry.summary: Ce mardi 4 août, Netflix a dévoilé la bande-annonce de sa nouvelle série horrifique, produite et réalisée par Ryan Murphy ("American Horror Story", "Hollywood", "The Politician") et Evan Romansky. Son nom? "Ratched".

entry.title: Les compositions probables de Inter-Getafe

link.title: Les compositions probables de Inter-Getafe

entry.content:
C’est le retour de la Coupe d’Europe ! La Ligue Europa fait son grand retour ce soir avec quatre matches dont un qui nous intéresse tout particulièrement. L’Inter Milan affronte Getafe (21H) sur le terrain de Gelsenkirchen pour un 8e de finale qui s’annonce à suspense. Particularité de cette rencontre : elle se joue sur un match sec alors que les autres rencontres (outre Séville-Roma demain) verront les matches retours de ces 8e se disputer en Allemagne.
Côté intériste, Antonio Conte, selon la Gazzetta dello sport, devrait aligner un 3-5-2 avec Diego Godin en défense centrale. Le duo Romelu Lukau-Lautaro Martinez devrait bien sûr être associé en attaque et tentera de forcer le verrou espagnol. Le club de la banlieue de Madrid arrivera en Allemagne avec un 4-4-2 classique. Mata et Molina seront les fers de lance d’une équipe qui voudra rejoindre les quarts de finale. Le vainqueur affrontera l’équipe victorieuse du match Glasgow Rangers-Leverkusen (1-3 à l’aller).
entry.summary: C’est le retour de la Coupe d’Europe ! La Ligue Europa fait son grand retour ce soir avec quatre matches dont un qui nous intéresse tout particulièrement. L’Inter Milan affronte Getafe (21H) sur le terrain de Gelsenkirchen pour un 8e de finale qui s’annonce à suspense. Particularité de cette rencontre : elle se joue sur un match sec alors que les autres rencontres (outre Séville-Roma demain) verront les matches retours de ces 8e se disputer en Allemagne. Côté intériste, Antonio Conte, selon la Gazzetta dello sport, devrait aligner un 3-5-2 avec Diego Godin en défense centrale. Le duo Romelu Lukau-Lautaro Martinez devrait bien sûr être associé en attaque et tentera de forcer le verrou espagnol. Le club de la banlieue de Madrid arrivera en Allemagne avec un 4-4-2 classique. Mata et Molina seront les fers de lance d’une équipe qui voudra rejoindre les quarts de finale. Le vainqueur affrontera l’équipe victorieuse du match Glasgow Rangers-Leverkusen (1-3 à l’aller).

entry.title: ITW - Cyril Saugrain, le consultant de la RTBF nous décrypte le cyclisme du moment : ‘Remco Evenepoel, Wout Van Aert, Egan Bernal, Primoz Roglic….leur différence !’

link.title: ITW - Cyril Saugrain, le consultant de la RTBF nous décrypte le cyclisme du moment : ‘Remco Evenepoel, Wout Van Aert, Egan Bernal, Primoz Roglic….leur différence !’

entry.content: Vainqueur d’une étape du Tour de France 1996 au Lac de Madine, Cyril Saugrain a été coureur professionnel de 1995 à 2003. Passé par les formations Aubervilliers 93, Cofidis, La Française des Jeux et BigMat-Auber93, le natif de Livry-Gargan (Seine-Saint-Denis) s’est reconverti avec succès dans les médias depuis 2012. Travaillant pour la RTBF depuis 2013, il en est depuis devenu le consultant phare et commente les plus grandes courses cycliste du monde pour la chaîne de télévision belge. Expert ès cyclisme, Cyril Saugrain est revenu pour Cyclism’Actu sur les sujets brûlants du moment.
entry.summary: Vainqueur d’une étape du Tour de France 1996 au Lac de Madine, Cyril Saugrain a été coureur professionnel de 1995 à 2003. Passé par les formations Aubervilliers 93, Cofidis, La Française des Jeux et BigMat-Auber93, le natif de Livry-Gargan (Seine-Saint-Denis) s’est reconverti avec succès dans les médias depuis 2012. Travaillant pour la RTBF depuis 2013, il en est depuis devenu le consultant phare et commente les plus grandes courses cycliste du monde pour la chaîne de télévision belge. Expert ès cyclisme, Cyril Saugrain est revenu pour Cyclism’Actu sur les sujets brûlants du moment.

entry.title: Happiness vs. Satisfaction: Which Is Better to Have?

link.title: Happiness vs. Satisfaction: Which Is Better to Have?

entry.content: In a world where we’re all trying to keep positive could having satisfaction be the answer? Buzz60’s Elitsa Bizios reports.
entry.summary: In a world where we’re all trying to keep positive could having satisfaction be the answer? Buzz60’s Elitsa Bizios reports.

entry.title: Flying Fox Yang Dibangun Dari Dana Desa Jadi Wisata Favorit Warga

link.title: Flying Fox Yang Dibangun Dari Dana Desa Jadi Wisata Favorit Warga

entry.content:
GORONTALO, KOMPAS TV - Dengan memanfaatkan sebuah lahan yang kosong disebuah pegunungan yang sebelumnya hanya dipenuhi oleh tumbuhan liar, Dengan mengunakan dana desa pemerintah desa hungayonaa, kecamatan tilamuta kabupaten boalemo gorontalo menyulap menjadi sebuah obyek wisata.
Kini Obyek Wisata yang dinagun menggunakan dana desa tersebut menjadi salah satu wisata warga setempat untuk menghabiskan liburan.
Wisata yang menjadi andalan warga, yakni wisata flying fox. sejak dibangun pada tahun 2019, wisata flying fox ini tak pernah sepi dari pengujung disetiap akhir pekan, atau dihari libur lainnya, meski sempat di tutup akibat pademi covid-19.
Namun sejak memasuki normal baru wisata flying fox sepanjang 300 meter tersebut kini mulai di datangi oleh pengujung baik dari dalam maupun pengujung dari luar Gorontalo.
Wisata yang bernama wisata Bulalo Love tersebut menjadi satu satunya wisata alternatif warga karena memberi tantangan tersendiri bagi pengujung, pasalnya, pengujung akan di suguhkan dengan ke indahan alam ketika disaat naik flying fox.
" ekstrim tapi seru, Alhamdulillah baru kali ini saya naik selama di Sulawesi ( Gorontalo) Menyenangkan, pemandangannya bagus sekali, ekosistemnya, ada danau, ada jagung, tumbuh-tumbuhan, kerenlah " Tutur Yura Azalia salah satu pengunjung dari Jawa .
Selain Itu, di wisata bulalo love didesa hungayonaa ini, pengunjung juga bisa menikmati wisata danau yang di lengkapi dengan fasilitas perahu dayung dan rakit tradisional.
Sementara itu kepala Desa Hungayonaa Mohamad Wisnu Sau mengungkapkan, pembangunan tempat wisata flying fox menggunakan desa tahun 2019 dengan anggaran sebesar 200 juta rupiah. pemerintah desa memilih wisata flying fox karena konsep wisata yang menguji adrenalin pengujung sangat jarang di temui di Gorontalo,
Hingga saat ini wisata flying fox dan wisata danau masih terus di benahi oleh pemerintah desa dengan melengkapi fasilitas tempat wisata lainnya. hal itu dilakukan agar pengujung bisa lebih banyak menikmati wahana wisata di bulalo love.
#Bulalolove #Dana Desa #Boalemo
entry.summary: GORONTALO, KOMPAS TV - Dengan memanfaatkan sebuah lahan yang kosong disebuah pegunungan yang sebelumnya hanya dipenuhi oleh tumbuhan liar, Dengan mengunakan dana desa pemerintah desa hungayonaa, kecamatan tilamuta kabupaten boalemo gorontalo menyulap menjadi sebuah obyek wisata. Kini Obyek Wisata yang dinagun menggunakan dana desa tersebut menjadi salah satu wisata warga setempat untuk menghabiskan liburan. Wisata yang menjadi andalan warga, yakni wisata flying fox. sejak dibangun pada tahun 2019, wisata flying fox ini tak pernah sepi dari pengujung disetiap akhir pekan, atau dihari libur lainnya, meski sempat di tutup akibat pademi covid-19. Namun sejak memasuki normal baru wisata flying fox sepanjang 300 meter tersebut kini mulai di datangi oleh pengujung baik dari dalam maupun pengujung dari luar Gorontalo. Wisata yang bernama wisata Bulalo Love tersebut menjadi satu satunya wisata alternatif warga karena memberi tantangan tersendiri bagi pengujung, pasalnya, pengujung akan di suguhkan dengan ke indahan alam ketika disaat naik flying fox. " ekstrim tapi seru, Alhamdulillah baru kali ini saya naik selama di Sulawesi ( Gorontalo) Menyenangkan, pemandangannya bagus sekali, ekosistemnya, ada danau, ada jagung, tumbuh-tumbuhan, kerenlah " Tutur Yura Azalia salah satu pengunjung dari Jawa . Selain Itu, di wisata bulalo love didesa hungayonaa ini, pengunjung juga bisa menikmati wisata danau yang di lengkapi dengan fasilitas perahu dayung dan rakit tradisional. Sementara itu kepala Desa Hungayonaa Mohamad Wisnu Sau mengungkapkan, pembangunan tempat wisata flying fox menggunakan desa tahun 2019 dengan anggaran sebesar 200 juta rupiah. pemerintah desa memilih wisata flying fox karena konsep wisata yang menguji adrenalin pengujung sangat jarang di temui di Gorontalo, Hingga saat ini wisata flying fox dan wisata danau masih terus di benahi oleh pemerintah desa dengan melengkapi fasilitas tempat wisata lainnya. hal itu dilakukan agar pengujung bisa lebih banyak menikmati wahana wisata di bulalo love. #Bulalolove #Dana Desa #Boalemo

entry.title: Meet the stars of the new BL series ‘Better Days’: Benedix Ramos & Chesther Chua PEP Live

link.title: Meet the stars of the new BL series ‘Better Days’: Benedix Ramos & Chesther Chua PEP Live

entry.content:
Another BL series to watch for is "Better Days" starring Benedix Ramos and Chesther Chua.
Both are newcomers in showbiz and are eager to show everyone their acting abilities.
Watch them soon and fall in love in "Better Days."
For now, get to know them well in this PEP Live interview with Jimpy Anarcon.
#betterdays #benedixramos #chesterchua #teambether
Host: Jimpy Anarcon
Producer: Rommel Llanes
Director: Kim Justine Gan
Know the latest in showbiz on
Subscribe to our YouTube channel!
Follow us!
Instagram:
Facebook:
Twitter:
Visit our DailyMotion channel!
Join us on Viber:

Watch them soon and fall in love in "Better Days." entry.title: Days of our Lives 8-11-20 (11th August 2020) 8-11-2020 DOOL 11 August 2020

link.title: Days of our Lives 8-11-20 (11th August 2020) 8-11-2020 DOOL 11 August 2020

entry.content:
Days of our Lives 8-11-20 (11th August 2020) 8-11-2020 DOOL 11 August 2020

entry.title: The Last of Us 2 adding additional difficulty settings?

link.title: The Last of Us 2 adding additional difficulty settings?

entry.content: The Last of Us 2 looks set to add two new difficulty settings, Grounded and Permadeath, after a trophy list update referencing them.
entry.summary: The Last of Us 2 looks set to add two new difficulty settings, Grounded and Permadeath, after a trophy list update referencing them.

entry.title: Mehboob Apke Qadmon Mein Last Episode HUM TV Drama 7 August 2020

link.title: Mehboob Apke Qadmon Mein Last Episode HUM TV Drama 7 August 2020

entry.content:
Mehboob Apke Qadmon Mein, Last Episode, Official HD Video - 7 August 2020
Starring
Sukaynah Khan, Zubab Rana, Saad Qureshi, Agha Mustafa, Shaheen Khan, Shahzia Gohar, Farhat Nazar, Parizae Fatima, Agha Talal, Zubair Akram, Syed Qamar Raza Rizvi.
Directed By: Furqan Adam
Written By: Imran Nazir
Produced By: Moomal Entertainment & MD Productions
#MehboobApkeQadmonMein #HUMTV #Drama
entry.summary: Mehboob Apke Qadmon Mein, Last Episode, Official HD Video - 7 August 2020 Starring Sukaynah Khan, Zubab Rana, Saad Qureshi, Agha Mustafa, Shaheen Khan, Shahzia Gohar, Farhat Nazar, Parizae Fatima, Agha Talal, Zubair Akram, Syed Qamar Raza Rizvi. Directed By: Furqan Adam Written By: Imran Nazir Produced By: Moomal Entertainment & MD Productions #MehboobApkeQadmonMein #HUMTV #Drama

entry.title: Witan dan Beckham, Bintang Harapan Timnas Indonesia U-19

link.title: Witan dan Beckham, Bintang Harapan Timnas Indonesia U-19

entry.content: VIVA – Beckam Putra Nugraha menjadi salah satu pemain yang dipanggil PSSI untuk mengikuti Training Camp (TC) mulai 23 Juli hingga 8 Agustus 2020 yang digelar di Stadion Madya, Senayan, Jakarta. Selain Beckam, pemain muda lain yang turut dipanggil dalam TC tersebut adalah Witan Sulaeman yang kini bermain di Super Liga Serbia bersama FK Radnik Surdulica. #BeckhamPutraNugraha #Timnas #PSSI
entry.summary: VIVA – Beckam Putra Nugraha menjadi salah satu pemain yang dipanggil PSSI untuk mengikuti Training Camp (TC) mulai 23 Juli hingga 8 Agustus 2020 yang digelar di Stadion Madya, Senayan, Jakarta. Selain Beckam, pemain muda lain yang turut dipanggil dalam TC tersebut adalah Witan Sulaeman yang kini bermain di Super Liga Serbia bersama FK Radnik Surdulica. #BeckhamPutraNugraha #Timnas #PSSI
